zh.lifeSummary: 當Alexander de Cheney II於大約1248年出生在英國素可紐姆時，他的父親Sir Alexander de Cheney I32歲，母親Agnes de Saye31歲。他和Agnes de Say至少有1個兒子。他去世於1295年在英國英格蘭肯特帕特利布恩享年48歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alexander de Cheney II于大约1248年出生在英国素可紐姆时，他的父亲Sir Alexander de Cheney I32岁，母亲Agnes de Saye31岁。他和Agnes de Say至少有1个儿子。他去世于1295年在英国英格兰肯特帕特利布恩享年48岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Cheney
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of   Chaney   with the same etymology as in 2 below.

French: topographic name for someone who lived by or in an oak wood, from Old French chesnai ‘oak grove’ (from chesne ‘oak’), or a habitational name from any of several places called (Le) Cheney, e.g. in Haute-Savoie, named with this word. Compare Chesney .

French Canadian: altered form of French Chesnay or Chenay, topographic names with the same meaning and etymology as in 2 above, or habitational names from (Le) Chesnay or (Le) Chenay, names of several places in the northwestern part of France, based on Old French chesnai ‘oak grove’. Compare Chenette and Chenier 2.

variants.name: Chenette
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Lucien, Armand.
Altered form of French Canadian Chenet, itself an (intermediate) altered form of Cheney 3. Altered ending reflects the Canadian and American French practice of sounding the final -t.
History: The (majority of the) Chenettes are descendants of Bertrand Chesnay/Chenay dit/sieur de La Garenne from Brittany (France); see Cheney .

variants.name: Chaney
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from any one of several places in Normandy, Picardy, or Artois (France) named (Le) Quesnay or Quesnoy, or elsewhere in northern France named (Le or La) Chesnay or Chesnoy. The placenames all derive from Old French chesnai or its Normanno-Picard equivalent quesnai ‘oak grove’ (medieval Latin casnetum).
French: variant of Chanet, a habitational name from any of various places called Chanet or Le Chanet, from Latin canna ‘reed’ + the suffix -etum denoting an inhabitant.

nameMeanings.name: Alexander
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Alexander de Cheney II was born about 1248, in Newtimber, Sussex, England, his father, Sir Alexander de Cheney I, was 32 and his mother, Agnes de Saye, was 31. He had at least 1 son with Agnes de Say. He died in 1295, in Patrixbourne, Kent, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 48.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alexander de Cheney II est né environ 1248, à Newtimber, Sussex, Angleterre, son père, Sir Alexander de Cheney I, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Agnes de Saye, avait 31 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Agnes de Say. Il est décédé en 1295, à Patrixbourne, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 48 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alexander de Cheney II um 1248 in Newtimber, Sussex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Alexander de Cheney I 32 und seine Mutter Agnes de Saye 31. Er hatte mit Agnes de Say mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1295 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Patrixbourne, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alexander de Cheney II è nato il circa 1248 nel Newtimber, Sussex, England, il suo padre, Sir Alexander de Cheney I, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Agnes de Saye, aveva 31 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Agnes de Say. Morì nel 1295, nel Patrixbourne, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 48 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alexander de Cheney IIが約1248年にイギリススセックスニューティンバーで生まれた時，父Sir Alexander de Cheney Iは32歳，母Agnes de Sayeは31歳であった。彼はAgnes de Sayとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1295年にイギリスイギリスケントプアトリクスボウルンで48歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alexander de Cheney II(이)가 대략 1248년 영국 수세스 뉴팀버에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Alexander de Cheney I(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes de Saye(은)는 31세였다. 그는 Agnes de Say(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1295년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 패트리스보우른에서 48세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alexander de Cheney II nasceu aproximadamente 1248, em Newtimber, Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Alexander de Cheney I, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Agnes de Saye, tinha 31 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Agnes de Say. Ele faleceu em 1295, em Patrixbourne, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 48 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alexander de Cheney II родился около 1248 г. в местности нютимбир, суссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Alexander de Cheney I было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Agnes de Saye, 31. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Agnes de Say. Он умер в 1295 г. в местности патриксбурн, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 48 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alexander de Cheney II nació aproximadamente 1248, en Newtimber, Sussex, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Alexander de Cheney I, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Agnes de Saye, tenía 31 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Agnes de Say. Murió en 1295, en Patrixbourne, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 48 años.
